jail_visit_vs_in_jail.visit: 正常经过或落在 index 7，无任何惩罚
jail_visit_vs_in_jail.in_jail: 被送入监狱的玩家标记为 is_in_jail=true，位置设为 index 7

entry_conditions.trigger: player rolls doubles 3 consecutive times in one turn sequence

in_jail_turn_flow.description: 监狱中玩家的回合开始时弹出监狱决策弹窗

result_success.note: 掷出双数出狱后的这次移动不算双数额外回合

forced_bail_on_third_turn.trigger: jail_turns_remaining reaches 0 after failed doubles attempt

player_fields.jail_turns_remaining: int, 0 when not in jail, set to 3 on entry

bankruptcy_rule_spec.trigger_condition: player cannot pay a mandatory obligation

mandatory_obligations.description: 落在他人地产上需支付租金
落在税务格需支付税款
第三回合强制保释需支付 $50

bankruptcy_process: release all owned properties to unowned state
remove player pawn from board (or grey out)
skip this player in future turn rotation
show bankruptcy popup to all players

property_release.description: 破产玩家的所有地产变为无主状态，不转移给债主
property_release.phase1_note: Phase 1 不做债主继承，统一释放为无主

player_state_tracking.money: int, starts at 1500, can reach 0 or below (triggers bankruptcy)

assumptions.assumption: 掷双数出狱后的移动不触发额外回合（不算入 consecutive_doubles）
破产时所有地产释放为无主，不转移给债主
第三回合强制保释时如资金不足则触发破产
监狱中玩家仍可收取名下地产的租金
assumptions.basis: GDD 未排除，与 property_economy_spec 一致

review_hints: 确认 jail_tile_index=7 与 board_topology_spec.corner_tiles.jail_visit 一致
确认 GO_TO_JAIL tile_index=21 与 board_topology_spec.corner_tiles.go_to_jail 一致
确认 triple_doubles 的 consecutive_doubles 计数与 turn_flow_spec 的 dice_rules 一致
确认 forced_bail 第三回合逻辑：jail_turns_remaining 从 3 递减到 0
确认 bankruptcy 释放地产与 property_economy_spec.ownership_model.transitions 一致
